allow: Bash(CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES="" qmd vsearch "memory safety resource management" -c wiki)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':', v.get\('status','?'\), '-', v.get\('error','ok'\)\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: v for k,v in d.items\(\) if 'mcp' in k.lower\(\) or 'plugin' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if 'mcp' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('name'\), d.get\('version'\), d.get\('main',''\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('main:', d.get\('main',''\)\); print\('scripts:', list\(d.get\('scripts',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node,bun -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 31092,14992,33204,16820,26256,13184 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Host '---after kill:'; Get-Process -Id 31092,14992,33204,16820,26256,13184 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter '\\''ProcessId=25132 OR ProcessId=14184 OR ProcessId=19652'\\'' | Select-Object ProcessId,Name,@{N='\\''Cmd'\\'';E={\($_.CommandLine -replace '\\''\\s+'\\'','\\'' '\\''\).Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(150,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap')
